name: Boon of the Soul Drinker
description: You increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30. You have resistance to cold and necrotic damage. When an enemy within 120 feet of you is reduced to 0 hit points, you can use your reaction to regain 50 hit points. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.
